title: Label Change Conditions: Carry Over to New Board When Duplicating
excerpt: When using any left to right workflow within CRM, you can create “Label Change Conditions” so that certain columns (on the left) must be completed prior to marking later columns (further right) as [complete]. Very helpfu…

posts.author: JamesBarter (James Barter)
posts.cookedHtml:
When using any left to right workflow within CRM, you can create “Label Change Conditions” so that certain columns (on the left) must be completed prior to marking later columns (further right) as [complete]. Very helpful to make sure no one skips ahead on important step by step tasks.

However, when duplicating this board, ALL of the “label change conditions” disappear in the new board. I would imagine if someone is duplicating the board, they would want to keep all of the boards’ custom features and automations, including these label change conditions. This would be consistent with all of the other features of that board that are being carried over into this duplicate board.

I don’t quite understand why this feature is not currently carried over. I imagine this would be an easy fix?
